y * y - y * z - y * z + z * z = y * y + z * z - (y * z + y * z)
(y + z) * (y + z) - x * x = double_yz + power
x * x - (y - z) * (y - z) = double_yz - power

proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[T]((x + y + z) * (-x + y + z), x - y + z, x + y - z)

goal: (prod + prod) * (prod + prod) = prod * prod + prod * prod + (prod * prod + prod * prod)
(dot + dot) * (dot + dot) = dot * dot + dot * dot + (dot * dot + dot * dot)
(area + area) * (area + area) = area * area + area * area + (area * area + area * area)
prod * prod = area * area + dot * dot
prod * prod + prod * prod + (prod * prod + prod * prod) - (dot * dot + dot * dot + (dot * dot + dot * dot)) = area * area + area * area + (area * area + area * area)

goal: heron_linear_product(x, y, z) = (y * z + y * z) * (y * z + y * z) - (y * y + z * z - x * x) * (y * y + z * z - x * x)
heron_linear_product(x, y, z) = (y * z + y * z) * (y * z + y * z) - (dot + dot) * (dot + dot)
(y * z + y * z) * (y * z + y * z) - (dot + dot) * (dot + dot) = (area + area) * (area + area)
